specs.key_requirements: Documents [sdd.issue_platform] schema — the new [sdd.repo_platform] and [sdd.spec_platform] sections follow the same structural pattern. Config upsert logic (strip_toml_sections) and interactive wizard in platform set must be extended to cover repo_platform and spec_platform. PlatformConfig::load() and SddSection in services/platform_sync/config.rs show the TOML deserialization pattern to mirror for RepoPlatformConfig and SpecPlatformConfig.

Defines the merge flowchart (DAG) and archive step where auto_commit and auto_pr must be injected. Post-archive git operations (stage all dirty under cclab/, commit, create PR) extend the terminal MergeComplete step. Frontmatter stripping table and audit logging patterns inform how git results should be surfaced.

Defines SddConfig struct fields — repo_platform and spec_platform fields must be added to SddConfig so create_change_merge.rs can read them via SddConfig::load_validated(). Envfile resolution order (global → provider-specific) applies to repo_platform auth too.

sdd_workflow_create_change_merge must be added to workflow-tools.md with its OpenRPC definition (currently unspecced — the tool exists in code but has no interface spec). Response schema needs new fields: git_commit_sha, pr_url, git_status to surface post-merge git results.
cclab sdd platform set wizard must be extended to configure [sdd.repo_platform] and [sdd.spec_platform] in addition to [sdd.issue_platform]. cclab sdd platform show must display all platform configs.

Authentication resolution order (env var → .env file → gh CLI fallback) is the same pattern used for repo_platform auth. GitHub API + gh CLI dual-transport pattern (reqwest or gh subprocess) applies to auto_pr PR creation.
ChangeMergeCreated → ChangeArchived transition context; git operations happen after ChangeArchived is set.
User-invoked merge skill that calls sdd_workflow_create_change_merge; auto_commit/auto_pr results should be included in skill output.
